CVE-2017-18869.title: A TOCTOU issue in the chownr package before 1.1.0 for Node.js 10. ...
CVE-2017-18869.description: A TOCTOU issue in the chownr package before 1.1.0 for Node.js 10.10 could allow a local attacker to trick it into descending into unintended directories via symlink attacks.
